domains.name: Identity
domains.tagline: Control who can reach what — and how.

lifecycle.description: Design zero-trust identity architecture, privilege model, and directory structure.
Evaluate standing privilege, MFA gaps, orphaned accounts, and identity sprawl.
Implement IAM controls, MFA enforcement, conditional access, and privilege management.
Define identity operational procedures, alert tuning, and access review cycles.
Reduce excess access, automate provisioning/deprovisioning, improve detection coverage.
Identity Security Assessment, Privileged Access Engineering, Zero Trust Identity Program.

domains.name: Cloud
domains.tagline: Secure the infrastructure your business runs on.

lifecycle.description: Design landing zones, network topology, IAM hierarchy, and data residency controls.
Identify misconfigurations, exposed services, excessive permissions, and compliance gaps.
Implement guardrails, enforce policies, harden configurations, enable logging.
Enable cloud-native monitoring, establish drift detection, define response runbooks.
Reduce attack surface, improve cost and security posture, automate controls.
Cloud Security Assessment, Cloud Landing Zone Engineering, Continuous Cloud Posture.

domains.name: Applications
domains.tagline: Security woven into every layer of your software.

lifecycle.description: Define application security standards, threat model, and SDLC security gates.
Test for OWASP Top 10, authentication flaws, business logic vulnerabilities.
Implement WAF, API security, SAST/DAST tooling, secrets management.
Define vulnerability management workflow and SLA for application findings.
Shift security left, reduce fix cycle time, improve developer security awareness.
Application Security Assessment, AppSec Engineering, Secure SDLC Implementation.

domains.name: Monitoring
domains.tagline: See everything. Respond to what matters.

lifecycle.description: Identify critical data sources, deploy log collection, establish normalized pipeline.
Build detection rules for high-value threats, calibrate to your environment.
Define correlation logic, reduce false positives, build detection coverage metrics.
Build triage runbooks, analyst workflows, and escalation procedures.
Integrate playbooks, automate containment actions, measure response time.
Regular detection reviews, purple team exercises, coverage gap analysis.

domains.name: Network
domains.tagline: Control the paths attackers move through.

lifecycle.description: Design segmentation model, firewall topology, zero-trust network access.
Identify flat network zones, exposed services, routing anomalies, lateral paths.
Implement micro-segmentation, secure DNS, firewall policy hardening.
Validate firewall rules, routing policies, and access control lists.
Enable network monitoring, define anomaly detection thresholds.
Reduce exposure, remove legacy trust paths, automate policy enforcement.

domains.name: Endpoints
domains.tagline: Harden the devices where your people work.

lifecycle.description: Evaluate patch posture, hardening baselines, detection coverage, unmanaged devices.
Deploy EDR, enforce CIS benchmarks, implement device compliance policies.
Test endpoint controls against real attack techniques, validate detection coverage.
Integrate endpoint telemetry into SIEM, tune alert quality, monitor fleet health.
Reduce unmanaged footprint, improve patch cadence, expand detection rules.
Endpoint Assessment, EDR Engineering, Endpoint Detection Optimization.

domains.name: Data
domains.tagline: Protect the asset everything else exists to guard.

lifecycle.description: Identify where sensitive data lives across structured and unstructured stores.
Define data classifications, apply labels, establish handling policies.

Map how sensitive data moves across systems, processes, and third parties. Identify uncontrolled flows, policy violations, and exposure paths. Powered by DFAnalyzer — Mitigence's tool that automates flow mapping and continuously validates flows against your data security policies.
Identify overprivileged access to sensitive data, reduce exposure.
Implement encryption at rest and in transit, DLP controls, access governance.
Test data controls, confirm encryption coverage, validate DLP rule efficacy.
Automate classification, improve data lineage visibility, reduce retention risk.

domains.name: Remote Access
domains.tagline: Secure distributed access without sacrificing usability.

lifecycle.description: Design zero-trust network access model, replace broad-trust VPN architecture.
Deploy ZTNA, device posture enforcement, session monitoring.
Validate access policies, certificate management, split-tunnel configurations.
Define access review cycles, third-party access governance.
Improve user experience, reduce VPN sprawl, enhance session visibility.
Remote Access Assessment, ZTNA Engineering, Third-Party Access Governance.
